cleavage agent: gel was stained with SYPRO Ruby stain (Thermo Scientific). Excised protein bands following SDS- PAGE were digested in gel with trypsin
enrichment method: RNA-affinity chromatography coupled with mass spectrometry
fragmentation method: followed by CID-based MS/MS, performed in the scan range of m/z 100 and m/z 2000
instrument: Full MS in the mass range between m/z 375 and m/z 1700 was performed on an Orbitrap Mass analyzer
